sentences.english: Being a top chef requires passion, dedication, and hard work.
sentences.korean: 최고의 셰프가 되려면 열정, 헌신, 노력이 필요해요.

sentences.english: Many chefs work 15 hours a day, six days a week, and busy kitchens cooking expensive food are very stressful places to work.
sentences.korean: 많은 셰프가 하루 15시간 주 6일 일하고 비싼 음식을 만드는 바쁜 주방은 매우 스트레스가 많은 곳이에요.

sentences.english: I decided to send my CV to all the three-Michelin-star restaurants that I could find.
sentences.korean: 찾을 수 있는 모든 미슐린 3스타 레스토랑에 이력서를 보내기로 했어요.

sentences.english: So, you aimed high from the off.
I aimed high. The only thing that they could say was no, and what would I lose?
sentences.korean: 높은 목표를 잡았어요. 최악의 경우 거절뿐이고 뭘 잃겠어요?

quiz.question: What does '이력서 — 학력, 경력을 정리한 문서 (미국: résumé)' mean in English?

sentences.english: I received a call from chef Paul Rhodes to say, 'When can you start?' And this just catapulted my career.
sentences.korean: 셰프 폴 로즈에게서 '언제 시작할 수 있어?'라는 전화를 받았고, 이것이 제 경력을 급상승시켰어요.

sentences.english: When I opened Mosaic in South Africa, I knew I wanted something entirely different and something which diners had not seen.
sentences.korean: 남아공에서 모자이크를 열었을 때 손님들이 본 적 없는 완전히 다른 것을 원한다는 걸 알았어요.

sentences.english: I wanted to have my own signature and to stand out.
sentences.korean: 나만의 시그니처를 갖고 눈에 띄고 싶었어요.

sentences.english: In 2017 she won the title Best Female Chef in the World.
sentences.korean: 2017년에 세계 최고 여성 셰프 타이틀을 수상했어요.

sentences.english: These achievements have helped Chantel stand out — to be more noticeable and better than other chefs.
sentences.korean: 이런 성과들이 찬텔을 다른 셰프보다 더 눈에 띄게 해줬어요.

sentences.english: Who is the winner of the most Michelin stars ever?
sentences.korean: 역대 미슐린 스타 최다 수상자는 31개 스타를 받은 조엘 로뷔숑이에요 — 역사상 가장 화려한 셰프예요.

sentences.english: The right answer is Joël Robuchon, with 31 stars — the most decorated chef in history.
sentences.korean: / 정답은 조엘 로뷔숑, 31개 스타 — 역사상 가장 화려한 셰프.

quiz.question: What does '높은 목표를 잡다, 야심차게 도전하다' mean in English?
